protocols.Paper_title: Direct RT-PCR amplification of SARS-CoV-2 from clinical samples using a concentrated viral lysis-amplification buffer prepared with IGEPAL-630
protocols.Evidence: vLAB prepared with nonionic detergent IGEPAL CA-630; samples incubated 65 C for 10 min and used directly for RT-PCR detection

protocols.Paper_title: Direct RT-PCR amplification of SARS-CoV-2 from clinical samples using a concentrated viral lysis-amplification buffer prepared with IGEPAL-630
protocols.Evidence: lysis amplification buffer prepared with IGEPAL-630... IGEPAL is a mild detergent that induces cellular lysis but does not inhibit PCR enzymes; heat inactivation at 70 C confirmed
